name: rezzerv-local-startup
description: Configuratie voor de lokale Rezzerv-opstartprocedure op Windows PowerShell.

runtimeChecks.serviceWorkerCleanupRequiredWhen: Browser serves stale or mixed frontend files.

safetyRules: Run git status --short before git pull.
Do not pull when local changes are present unless intentionally preserving or committing them first.
Kill old frontend/backend processes before starting new runtime.
Do not treat npm run build as full validation; also run regression and browser runtime checks.
During recovery branches, do not pull blindly from a polluted remote branch.
